title: How to create a GitHub repository

steps.title: Sign in to GitHub
steps.description: Enter your credentials and click sign in to access GitHub.

steps.title: Click New Repository
steps.description: Find and click the green 'New' button on your dashboard.

steps.title: Enter Repository Name
steps.description: Type a unique name for your new repository.

steps.title: Configure Repository Settings
steps.description: Choose visibility, add description, and select initialization options.

steps.title: Create Repository
steps.description: Click the green 'Create repository' button to finish setup.

source: WikiHow — Create a Branch on GitHub
